description: Configure Wazuh File Integrity Monitoring (FIM) in the wazuh-wazuh.manager-1 container to monitor the critical application configuration file at /var/ossec/etc/critical_app.conf. Enable real-time monitoring and content diffing (report_changes) for this file. After applying the configuration, modify the file's content to trigger a FIM alert and verify that the generated alert includes the exact content difference (syscheck.diff).
